description: <onTimeout> misplaced outside its owning locus (§51.0.M / §4.15). <onTimeout> is a structural element grammatical only inside an <engine> state-child body; placed inside a ${ } logic body it is misplaced and fires E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED (the §34 error partition). This case uses the ${}-logic-body locus. The PLAIN <program> markup locus (a different 'outside' locus) now ALSO fires E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED — see the sibling case engine-ontimeout-misplaced-markup-pos (the prior E-ATTR-001/E-SCOPE-001 markup-locus divergence was fixed, diagnostic-precision-fixes-2026-07-10).
rationale: §51.0.M <onTimeout> is legal only inside an <engine> state-child body; used outside its owning locus -> E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED (§4.15 structural-element placement gate).
